zh_TW.err.invalid_ip_address: Error: ip_address must be a valid IPv4 address.
zh_TW.tool.description: Execute basic ECHONET Lite control on a node and return a JSON or text result.
zh_TW.param.eoj.description: Optional target EOJ (e.g. '013001'). If omitted, the node profile object is used.
zh_TW.param.obj.description: Optional object code to narrow the queried object (e.g. '0130').
zh_TW.param.value.description: Optional numeric value for set_value/open/close actions. Range: 0-100.
